rows.source_ref: "Forex scalping strategy 90% accurate: you can understand it by looking at these charts and myfxbook profile" by Forexerguru, forums.babypips.com, 2023, https://forums.babypips.com/t/forex-scalping-strategy-90-accurate-you-can-understand-it-by-looking-at-these-charts-and-myfxbook
rows.concept: Claims a discretionary exhaustion/price-action scalp on FX crosses (EURSGD, EURCAD, CADJPY, EURAUD) but never states any mechanical trigger.
rows.eligibility_reason: No mechanical entry/exit rules stated anywhere; pure chart-screenshot signal-sharing/self-promotion, and poster adds fresh capital during drawdowns (martingale-like) with DD ~2x gains.
rows.notes: Timeframe unstated (scalping implied). Legacy '20 EMA + Stochastic + RVGI' system referenced (#8/#9) but poster explicitly disavows indicators (#13) advising unspecified 'price action'. myfxbook DD ~2x gains (#18). Repeated capital injection to survive drawdowns (#22-26: 'I always add more capital when all trades are closed') = incompatible with FTMO/DXZ DD limits. User #38 confirms no strategy explanation exists in the thread.

notes: zero usable candidates: thread is discretionary signal-sharing with no stated rules; martingale-style capital-adding
